summary: metrics-pipeline-d8k2 ships beacon scripts auto-executed via postinstall
details: The package's package.json declares a postinstall hook ("postinstall": "node run.js") that runs automatically on npm install. The tarball contains beacon34.js and beacon_linux.js, both of which import child_process together with the http/https modules and read host/process information (process.env, process.platform, os.hostname(), os.platform()) before issuing outbound HTTP GET/POST and http.request calls. The combination of an automatic install-time entry point with bundled host-info beacons that perform outbound HTTP is consistent with installer-side reconnaissance and exfiltration on every install of this package, with no relationship to any documented library purpose. The naming of the files ("beacon34.js", "beacon_linux.js") further indicates the intent is host beaconing rather than legitimate package functionality.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
